_meta.what: Resolution map for the Thin-Brain schema fork: the 7 PRIMARY_INTEL_KEYS that build_production_brief_engine.py reads were dropped by Thin-Brain v4.2 (commit f80d27e4). This table is RABIE's PROVISIONAL ruling on the rewire-vs-strip fork. CALL-PATH CORRECTED 2026-06-20 (Rule #9, grep-verified): NO reader is in an automated live path. build_production_brief_engine.py is a MANUAL-ONLY brief tool (ogz_enricher.py:162 EXCLUDES it — 'calls Claude API'; run_post_extraction_pipeline.py:106 says 'run manually'; the pilot producer produce_batch.py does NOT use it — it builds from clients/<h>/profile/strategy_brief.json). The other 3 readers (calibrate_cd_router, creative_pipeline, overnight_improver) are standalone/test-referenced only. So the fork is really: REWIRE build_production_brief_engine onto the new v4.2 keys IF the manual brief tool is still used, or STRIP it if produce_batch has superseded it; the 3 standalone readers PARK for DELETE APPROVED (strip is a deletion; never delete without Mohamed).
_meta.decided_by: RABIE (provisional, logged data/make_sure_log.jsonl) — awaits Mohamed's one-tap confirm before the live reader is rewired in code.
_meta.rule_basis: Rule #6 (severed wire), #9 (every new-key target VERIFIED to exist by test_intel_schema_map.py before it is quoted as a rewire target), #13 (the rewire changes LIVE brief content → Mohamed's eye gates it).
_meta.shape_warning: Mappings are NOT 1:1 in shape. A blind variable-swap would feed wrong-shaped guidance into live briefs (a new silent severance). The actual code rewire (B057b) must adapt the consumption shapes per the shape_gap notes below; until then intel_health() keeps every degraded brief honestly flagged.

sector_playbooks.shape_gap: OLD: keyed by exact sector, inner {must_use, never_use, winning_formulas, visual_dna}. NEW sector_facts: keyed by sector-GROUP (f_and_b, retail_lifestyle, fashion, beauty_personal_care, healthcare_wellness, real_estate); inner shape differs. Rewire must map sector->group and re-read inner fields.

universal_rules.shape_gap: OLD: flat list of rule strings. NEW cultural_guardrails: dict of forbidden_* lists + modesty_rules; arabic_quality_rules: dialect/saudi_markers/proven_caption_patterns. Rewire must flatten the relevant sub-lists into the universal-rule slot.

anti_patterns.shape_gap: OLD: list of anti-pattern strings. NEW: cultural_guardrails.forbidden_behaviors/forbidden_props/forbidden_gestures + caption_data_rules.opener_rules/ending_rules (the 'never do' half).

occasion_rules.shape_gap: OLD: list of {occasion, verdict}; code builds {occasion: rule} and reads .verdict (use/avoid/use_selectively). NEW occasion_calendar: dict keyed by occasion, NO 'verdict' field; occasion_required_words: dict of required terms. Rewire must derive verdict from calendar semantics or drop the verdict read.

visual_rules.shape_gap: OLD: list of visual rule strings. NEW: cultural_guardrails.forbidden_visuals (the 'never show') + visual_intelligence (the positive guidance).

caption_rules.shape_gap: OLD: list of caption rule strings. NEW: caption_data_rules (opener/ending/emoji/hashtag rules) + arabic_quality_rules.proven_caption_patterns + caption_intelligence (per-brand).

format_rules.shape_gap: OLD: format rule list (length/emoji/hashtag). NEW caption_data_rules carries length_by_sector + emoji_rules + hashtag_rules directly — closest to a clean 1:1.

manual_only_reader_to_rewire_or_strip: build_production_brief_engine.py (NOT auto-live: enricher excludes it, produce_batch does not use it; run manually only)
